title: Better Irons
description: This mod adds new more advanced iron items, but they are weaker than netherite and stronger than diamond
body:
# ✨ Better Iron – Minecraft Mod ✨

This mod adds new, more advanced iron items 🛡️⚔️, but they are weaker than netherite ⚡ and stronger than diamond 💎.

## 🔥 Features

- **⚔️ New Weapons:** Advanced swords and tools with balanced stats.  
- **🛡️ New Armor:** Protect yourself with mid-tier gear between diamond and netherite.  
- **🎯 Balanced Gameplay:** Items designed for strategic use, not just raw power.  
- **⚡ Forge Compatible:** Works perfectly with modern Minecraft Forge versions.  

## 📥 Installation

1. Ensure Minecraft and Forge are installed.  
2. Place the mod file in your `mods` folder.  
3. Launch the game and enjoy your advanced iron items!  

**💡 Note:** Netherite is still the ultimate gear—Better Iron bridges the gap between diamond and netherite!
